ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2514.

Harold B. Auerbach, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Jonathan Neil & Associates, Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defendants Geertz Printing, Co., Inc., a corporation, Darrell Rogers, Patricia Rogers or Steve Rogers.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 28, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 13 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jonathan Neil & Associates, Inc., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Geertz Printing Co., Inc., a corporation, Darrell Rogers, Patricia Rogers and Steve Rogers (sued as Doe 2) as follows:

Damages/Principal - $84,435.61.
Prejudgment Interest - $25,520.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $555.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $99,796.95.

Additionally, it is further Ordered that plaintiff Jonathan Neil & Associates, Inc., a corporation, is the owner of, and entitled to possession to, the collateral described in Exhibit 1 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Continued To Dec-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
